questions.question: Which restaurants in Seattle Wa are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Seattle Wa with weekend hours include: Starbucks (Sat: 06:00-21:00), Starbucks (Sat: 05:30-20:00), MOD Pizza (Sat: 10:30-23:00), Subway (Sat: 09:00-21:00), Sai Gon Pho & Banh Mi (Sat: 09:30-20:00), Subway (Sat: 08:00-20:00), Pho Asia (Sat: 10:00-24:00), Naan-N-Curry (Sat: 12:00-21:00) and 1217 more. 1225 total with weekend availability.
